versions.version_description: Easy to play version using a Capo on the 2nd fret.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]C#m[/ch]     
I'm your friend you can talk to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
I read your fate I see misery[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]C#m[/ch]
Cause the one you love has left you dry[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]D#[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
Don't start believin' that you're gonna die[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Just pick your heart up off the floor and try, try again[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
You'll find[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
Better love next time baby, don't give up and I know you're gonna find[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]G7[/ch]
Better love next time baby, someone will be waiting down the line[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]E7[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
With better love, better love, better love, better love next time[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]
Sometimes it's better to let it all go[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
I've been there and I think I should know[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
So have a good cry, wash out your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]D#[/ch]
If you keep it inside it'll tear you apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]                               [ch]E[/ch]
Sometimes you lose but you're gonna win if you just, if you just, keep hanging in[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
You'll find[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
Better love next time baby, don't give up and I know you're gonna find[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]G7[/ch]
Better love next time baby, someone will be waiting down the line[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
With better love, better love[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
Better love next time baby, don't give up and I know you're gonna find[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]G7[/ch]
Better love next time baby, someone will be waiting down the line[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
With better love, better love[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Better love next time baby...[/tab]
